question: Only the best-performing advertising channels are plotted here. What does this imply about the campaign's performance across all channels?

options.A: The campaign is very effective on every channel, since all channels shown respond strongly to increased spend.
options.B: The campaign is ineffective overall because only a few points show improvement.
options.C: The campaign looks effective on these best-performing channels, but we cannot infer performance on all channels without seeing weaker ones.
options.D: The campaign harms performance because higher spend always reduces sales in these points.

explanation: The chart excludes channels where spend may not convert as well, so it overstates how broadly the campaign succeeds.
